odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome to the Farm!

Hello!

In this project we are going to learn about farm animals🐄 🐑 🐔 🐷

Are you ready to play and speak in English!
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260330204649206HVE","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Welcome to the Farm!

Hello!

In this project we are going to learn about farm animals🐄 🐑 🐔 🐷

Are you ready to play and speak in English! 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
A continuación, veréis las actividades que vamos a realizar durante esta SdA, así como la duración de las mismas y el agrupamiento:

    Mind Map Actividades de Marina María Zafra Plaza
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260330180939177V1O","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

A continuación, veréis las actividades que vamos a realizar durante esta SdA, así como la duración de las mismas y el agrupamiento:

    Mind Map Actividades de Marina María Zafra Plaza

    ","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
A través de las diferentes actividades, llegaremos a la Final Task: My Favourite Farm Animal

En ella, tendréis que crear un lapbook sobre vuestro animal favorito, grabaros presentándolo y compartirlo con la clase, usando Genially. Pinchando en el enlace, tendréis más información: 

{{context_path}}/20260330175542615DXI/4.1_Elegimos_la_herramienta.pdf
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260330175542615DXI","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

odeComponent.htmlView:
Aquí tienes algunos consejos para llevar a cabo tu actividad de manera segura:

    Infografía Ciberseguridad Internet Online Consejos Ilustrado Tecnológico Verde Gris de Marina María Zafra Plaza

{"ideviceId":"20260330174718321D2T","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

odeComponent.htmlView:
📘 Guía didáctica

This teaching guide helps teachers to implement the project "Farm Animals" in 1st grade of Primary Education.

🎯 Relationship between activities and evaluation criteria

Activity Description Evaluation criteria
Session 1: Introduction Discovering the animals by using flashcards Recognises basic vocabulary related to farm animals
Session 2: Vocabulary Learning and repeating animal names and its charcateristics Recognises basic vocabulary
Session 3: Song Listen to the song and sing it Associates words with images and sounds
Session 4: Grammar (production) Drawing and completing simple sentences Produces simple written/oral structures
Session 5: Guess the animal  Interactive games Associate words with images
Session 6&7: Final task Prepare and presentat your favourite farm animal

Participates in basic oral interaction using simple expressions

🧠 Key competences

  • Linguistic communication
  • Digital competence
  • Learning to learn

📝 Recommendations for teachers

  • Use visual support (flashcards, images)
  • Repeat structures frequently
  • Encourage participation in a safe environment
  • Adapt activities to different learning rhythms

🌈 Attention to diversity:

  • Visual support
    Simple language
    Flexible tasks

🧠 DUA principles:

  • Multiple ways of learning (audio, images, games)
    Different ways to express learning (drawing, speaking, digital)
    Motivation through play and creativity
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"202603302106249486UK","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

📘 Guía didáctica

This teaching guide helps teachers to implement the project "Farm Animals" in 1st grade of Primary Education.

🎯 Relationship between activities and evaluation criteria

Activity Description Evaluation criteria
Session 1: Introduction Discovering the animals by using flashcards Recognises basic vocabulary related to farm animals
Session 2: Vocabulary Learning and repeating animal names and its charcateristics Recognises basic vocabulary
Session 3: Song Listen to the song and sing it Associates words with images and sounds
Session 4: Grammar (production) Drawing and completing simple sentences Produces simple written/oral structures
Session 5: Guess the animal  Interactive games Associate words with images
Session 6&7: Final task Prepare and presentat your favourite farm animal

Participates in basic oral interaction using simple expressions

🧠 Key competences

  • Linguistic communication
  • Digital competence
  • Learning to learn

📝 Recommendations for teachers

  • Use visual support (flashcards, images)
  • Repeat structures frequently
  • Encourage participation in a safe environment
  • Adapt activities to different learning rhythms

🌈 Attention to diversity:

  • Visual support
    Simple language
    Flexible tasks

🧠 DUA principles:

  • Multiple ways of learning (audio, images, games)
    Different ways to express learning (drawing, speaking, digital)
    Motivation through play and creativity
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Aquí tenéis las herramientas que necesitaréis para la elaboración de vuestra tarea final:

Para el alumnado,

https://view.genially.com/69b3292576410643efa559ac/presentation-curacion-de-contenidos-para-el-alumnado

Para los docentes:

https://www.canva.com/design/DAHEDDHk0iE/FtrUNZx9Whx-ydvGidzyrw/view?utm_content=DAHEDDHk0iE&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=uniquelinks&utlId=he97f920f84
